procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1036.003
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1036.003 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

runs.stdout:
PathToAtomicsFolder = /opt/atomic-red-team/atomics

Executing test: T1036.003-2 Masquerading as FreeBSD or Linux crond process.
Exit code: 0
Done executing test: T1036.003-2 Masquerading as FreeBSD or Linux crond process.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1036.003 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 2 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1036.003'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1036.003 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 2

sigma.title: Remote Access Tool - Renamed MeshAgent Execution - MacOS
Potential Homoglyph Attack Using Lookalike Characters in Filename
Suspicious Download From Direct IP Via Bitsadmin
Suspicious Download From File-Sharing Website Via Bitsadmin

osquery.name: t1036_003_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1036_003_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
